### Post by Tienshinan8 on 2009-01-30
I have dial-up, and I have the right modem driver installed, but every time I shutdown or hibernate and then bring the system back up, I have to reinstall the modem to get it to connect. If I don't, then I get this:

--> Ignoring malformed input line: ";Do NOT edit this file by hand!"
--> WvDial: Internet dialer version 1.60
--> Cannot open /dev/ttySHCF0: Device or resource busy
--> Cannot open /dev/ttySHCF0: Device or resource busy
--> Cannot open /dev/ttySHCF0: Device or resource busy

When I open the thing to reinstall it, it acknowledges that the driver is already installed, but I still have to do it anyway.

Why is this so?
